key_principles: Data Density with Clarity: Appraisers need data, not fluff.
Institutional Trust: Use deep greens and crisp whites.
Print-Ready Logic: The screen report must look like the PDF.
Mexican Context: Localized terminology (Colonia, Alcaldía, Predial).

typography.installation: IMPERATIVE: Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - The anchor of trust.

secondary.description: Vibrant Sage - Growth and active elements.

accent.description: Pale Lime - Highlighting key data points.

grid_strategies.report: w-full max-w-[210mm] mx-auto bg-white shadow-2xl p-[20mm] (A4 Ratio)

buttons.primary: rounded-md bg-[#1B4332] text-white hover:bg-[#2D6A4F] px-8 py-3 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-md border-2 border-[#1B4332] text-[#1B4332] hover:bg-[#1B4332] hover:text-white px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#1B4332] hover:bg-[#D9ED92]/30 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium

cards.feature: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all p-8
cards.property_preview: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
cards.metric: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-100 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white focus:border-[#52B788] focus:ring-[#52B788]/20 transition-all font-medium text-[#1B4332]
inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-[#1B4332] mb-2 block

motion_guidelines.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion_guidelines.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

specific_instructions.report_generation: The report page (Reporte de Valuación) must be designed as a 'Digital Twin' of a physical paper document. Use CSS @media print to hide navbars and ensure page breaks are clean.
specific_instructions.map_integration: Use a grayscale or muted map style. Do not use default vibrant Google Maps colors. Overlays should be in the #1B4332 palette.
specific_instructions.forms: Split long forms into 'Steppers' (e.g., Ubicación > Características > Legal > Fotos). Do not overwhelm the user with 50 inputs at once.
specific_instructions.comparables_grid: When showing comparables, use a dense table or horizontal scroll cards. Key metric: '$/m²' must be highlighted.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure all inputs have a valid label.
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Never use 'Lorem Ipsum' in final output - use realistic real estate copy.
Respect the 'Institutional Green' constraint - do not drift into Teal or Blue.
